PEDIATRICS & CRITICAL CARE

Children's Services & Neonatal ICU

Comprehensive medical care, newborn emergency operations, and behavioral development consultations for infants, children, and teens.

General Pediatrics

Complete medical monitoring including Newborn Care, child health checkups, fever treatment, child growth tracking, developmental assessment, and pediatric nutrition guidance.

  • Growth & Nutrition Monitoring
  • Pediatric Fever Clinic
Consult Now

Neonatology & NICU

Critical 24/7 Level-III Neonatal ICU for premature baby care, low birth weight care, high-risk newborn monitoring, neonatal ventilator support, and phototherapy cycles.

  • Level III Advanced NICU
  • Neonatal Ventilation
Consult Now

Pediatric ICU (PICU)

Dedicated emergency critical care ward offering ventilator support, pediatric trauma care, poisoning care, and emergency pediatric seizure management protocols.

  • 24/7 Pediatric Emergency Room
  • Life Support & Ventilation
Consult Now

Vaccination Centre

Immunization clinics providing birth vaccines, government vaccines, and optional vaccines (including HPV, Flu, Rotavirus, and Pneumococcal schedules).

  • WHO Standard Storage
  • Optional & Travel Immunization
Consult Now

Child Development

Early identification and behavioral consulting for Autism screening, ADHD management, speech delay, learning disabilities, and developmental delays.

  • Speech & Learning Assessments
  • Cognitive Screening
Consult Now

Pediatric Neurology

Specialized treatments for pediatric epilepsy, seizures, cerebral palsy coordination, pediatric headaches, and childhood neuromuscular disorders.

  • Epilepsy & Seizure Clinic
  • Cerebral Palsy Rehabilitation
Consult Now

Pediatric Pulmonology

Expert diagnosis and management for pediatric asthma, allergies, bronchitis, pneumonia, and persistent chronic cough pathologies.

  • Allergy Skin Testing
  • Asthma Inhaler Training
Consult Now

Gastroenterology

Therapeutic management for chronic constipation, infant diarrhea, pediatric liver disease, feeding problems, and acid reflux discomfort.

  • Pediatric Constipation Clinic
  • Acid Reflux Assessments
Consult Now
PALLAWI HOSPITAL

Exceptional orthopedic care, children's services, and critical care units in Mancherial, Telangana. Blending clinical brilliance with genuine compassion.
